metadata.description: E-commerce customer support tickets for OpenEnv environment

task1_classify.description: Easy — Agent reads a single ticket and classifies it. No response needed.

tickets.ticket_text: Hi, I was charged twice for my order placed on March 12th. Please help me fix this.
My package was supposed to arrive 3 days ago but it still hasn't shown up. The tracking page just says 'in transit'.
I received a damaged item. The box was completely crushed and the product inside is broken. I want a replacement or a full refund.
The laptop I bought keeps crashing after 10 minutes of use. I've tried restarting multiple times.
Do you offer student discounts? I'm looking to buy a few items for my dorm room.
I returned my shoes two weeks ago but I still haven't received my money back. The return was confirmed by your team.

task2_respond.description: Medium — Agent classifies the ticket AND drafts an appropriate response. Grader checks tone, completeness, and accuracy.

policies.damaged_item_policy: Customer is entitled to a full refund or replacement within 30 days of delivery.
policies.billing_dispute_policy: Duplicate charges are refunded within 3-5 business days after verification.
policies.return_confirmation_policy: Refunds are processed within 7 business days of return receipt confirmation.

tickets.ticket_text: I was charged $149.99 twice for the same order. Please refund the extra charge immediately.
I ordered a winter jacket 10 days ago and it hasn't arrived yet. I need it for an event this weekend!
The blender I received has a cracked lid. I sent photos already. I want a refund, not a replacement.
forbidden_statements: must return first before refund decision

tickets.ticket_text: My new headphones connect fine but the right earbud produces no sound at all. Is this a known issue?
Can I change the delivery address for an order after it has been placed? The order was placed 2 hours ago.
forbidden_statements: you should have done it earlier

tickets.ticket_text: I returned my order 10 days ago and still have not received the refund. The tracking shows it was delivered to your warehouse.

task3_escalate.description: Hard — Multi-turn conversation. Customer is frustrated and escalating. Agent must de-escalate, resolve the issue, and remain consistent across all turns.

escalation_rules.repeated_unresolved_billing: escalate to billing_team after 2 failed attempts

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer has been charged 3 times for one order over 2 weeks. Has contacted support twice before with no resolution. Now threatening to dispute with credit card company.

conversation_history.content: This is ridiculous. I've been charged THREE times for order ORD-29100 and nobody has fixed it. I called twice already!
Don't give me another apology. I want this fixed TODAY or I'm filing a chargeback with my bank.
I was told last week the refund would be processed in 3 days. That was 7 days ago. What happened?

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer ordered a birthday gift. It is now 2 weeks late. First agent told her it would arrive in 2 days — it didn't. She is very upset.

conversation_history.content: My order ORD-83021 was supposed to be a birthday gift. It's now 2 weeks late. I was told it would arrive on the 20th. It's the 4th now!
The last agent told me 2 days ago it would arrive yesterday. It didn't. Stop lying to me.
I don't want tracking information. I want to know exactly where it is and who is responsible for this mess.

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer bought an expensive camera. It stopped working after 3 days. First asked for repair, then replacement — both denied by previous agents. Now threatening legal action.

conversation_history.content: The camera I bought for $800 stopped working after 3 days. This is completely unacceptable.
I was told I could get a replacement but now another agent says no. Which is it? Your team keeps contradicting itself.
I am going to contact consumer protection services if this is not resolved today. I have all the chat transcripts saved.

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer returned items 3 weeks ago. Refund still not received. Has screenshots of all communication. Becoming increasingly frustrated across 3 turns.

conversation_history.content: It has been 3 weeks since I returned my items and still no refund. I have the return tracking confirmation.
I was told last week it would be processed in 2 business days. That was 6 days ago.
I am done waiting. Either you process my refund right now or I am posting this entire conversation on social media.

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer's order was marked delivered but never received. Neighbour confirmed no parcel. Suspects theft or misdelivery. Previous agent closed the ticket without resolution.

conversation_history.content: Your system says my order was delivered but I never received it. My neighbour was home all day and confirms nothing arrived.
A previous agent closed my ticket saying it was delivered. How can you close a ticket when I never got my package?
I want someone to actually investigate this, not just copy-paste a response at me.

tickets.scenario_summary: Customer bought a smart home device that is incompatible with their existing setup despite the product page claiming compatibility. Multiple agents gave conflicting technical advice.

conversation_history.content: The smart hub I bought says on your website it is compatible with HomeKit. It is not. I've spent 4 hours trying to set it up.
One agent told me to update the firmware. Another told me to reset the device. Neither worked. These people don't know what they're talking about.
If your product page has wrong information, that is false advertising. I want either a fix or a full refund.
